lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Who did God choose to build the temple?
Why couldn’t David build the temple?
answers: He had shed much blood in battle

questions.text: Who made the plans for the temple?
What kind of wood was used for the temple?
What made the temple especially beautiful?
answers: It was covered in gold and had large cherubim
It was covered with diamonds and rubies

questions.text: How long did it take to build the temple?
What items were brought from the Tabernacle into the temple?
answers: Lampstand, table of bread, altar of incense, and the ark

questions.text: What happened when the ark was brought into the temple?
answers: God’s presence filled it like a cloud

questions.text: Why don’t we need a temple to meet with God now?
answers: Jesus died to pay for our sins
God doesn't fit in a temple anymore
Because our church is the temple

questions.text: What does it mean that we are God’s temple?
answers: We are supposed to build a new temple
